faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before purchasing your next premium vehicle

reserve.question: How do I reserve a premium vehicle?
reserve.answer: Simply select the vehicle from our catalogue and click 'Reserve Vehicle'. A dedicated advisor will contact you to manage all the details, from paperwork to payment, ensuring a smooth and exclusive purchasing experience.

warranty.question: What warranty coverage is included?
warranty.answer: All our vehicles come with a minimum 12-month warranty covering engine, gearbox, electrical system and key components. You can also extend coverage up to 3 years for complete peace of mind. Each vehicle is delivered with a detailed warranty certificate.

delivery.question: Do you deliver throughout Spain?
delivery.answer: Yes, we offer a premium door-to-door delivery service throughout Spain. Your vehicle is transported in an enclosed carrier to ensure it arrives in showroom condition. International shipping across Europe is also available upon request.

financing.question: What financing options do you offer?
financing.answer: We partner with leading financial institutions to offer competitive terms tailored to your profile. Choose from 12 to 96 months, with or without a deposit. Our finance team provides free, no-obligation advice to help you find the perfect payment plan.

quality.question: What quality checks do your vehicles go through?
quality.answer: Every vehicle goes through a rigorous certification process including: a 150+ point mechanical inspection, full electronic review with computerised diagnostics, service history and accident record verification, on-road performance testing, and a professional aesthetic review. Only vehicles that pass all checks are listed for sale.

trade_in.question: Can I trade in my current vehicle?
trade_in.answer: Yes, we accept vehicles as part exchange. We provide a free, no-obligation professional valuation considering brand, model, year, mileage and overall condition. The trade-in value is deducted directly from the price of your new vehicle, making the upgrade seamless.

schedule.question: What are your opening hours?
schedule.answer: We are available Monday to Saturday from 10:00 to 14:00 and 16:00 to 20:00. You can also reach us via WhatsApp or email outside business hours.

test_drive.question: Can I arrange a test drive?
test_drive.answer: Of course. You can schedule a test drive by contacting us via phone, WhatsApp or through the vehicle detail page. We will arrange a convenient time so you can experience the vehicle first-hand before making your decision.

testimonials.name: Jordi M.
testimonials.review: I bought a BMW 5 Series from Luxury Car and the experience was exceptional. From the first contact, the team attended to me with total professionalism, explaining every detail of the vehicle and its complete history. The car was immaculate and the price very competitive compared to other dealerships. Absolutely recommended.

testimonials.name: Marta G.
testimonials.review: I was looking for a pre-owned Mercedes GLC and found exactly what I needed at Luxury Car. The advice was outstanding — they helped me choose the ideal model for my needs and the financing was arranged in record time. The condition of the vehicle far exceeded my expectations.

testimonials.name: Pedro S.
testimonials.review: Professional and transparent buying process. They kept me informed at all times about the status of my Audi Q5. The car arrived home in perfect condition with transport included. Great experience, I would definitely use them again.

testimonials.name: Laura R.
testimonials.review: Very happy with my purchase of a Volvo XC60 at Luxury Car. The team took the time to understand my needs and presented options that fit my budget perfectly. The service was personal, professional and pressure-free. I recommend them without hesitation.

testimonials.name: Marc T.
testimonials.review: Great selection of premium vehicles and very fair treatment. I bought a Porsche Cayenne and the process was quick. The vehicle was exactly as described in the photos and specifications. Would definitely buy here again.

testimonials.name: Ana B.
testimonials.review: A 10/10 buying experience. I purchased a Range Rover Evoque and the entire process was flawless — personalised advice, quick paperwork and punctual delivery. The Luxury Car team inspires trust and professionalism. Highly recommended for anyone looking for a quality vehicle.

section_1_1.title: 1.1 Identification of the Owner
section_1_1.content: In compliance with Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSICE), we inform you that this website is owned by:

section_1_2.title: 1.2 Terms of Use
section_1_2.content: Access to and use of the website confers the status of user and implies acceptance of the following conditions:
items: The user agrees to use the site lawfully and in accordance with current regulations.
The company may modify the content and conditions of the site at any time without prior notice.
The permanent availability of the site or the absence of errors is not guaranteed.

section_1_3.title: 1.3 Intellectual and Industrial Property
section_1_3.content: All content on the website (texts, images, logos, designs, etc.) is the property of Luxury Car or authorised third parties. Its reproduction, distribution or modification is prohibited without express authorisation.

section_1_4.title: 1.4 Liability
section_1_4.content: We are not responsible for the improper use of the website or for third-party links that may appear on it.

section_1_5.title: 1.5 Legislation and Jurisdiction
section_1_5.content_prefix: This legal notice is governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts of

section_2_2.title: 2.2 Data We Collect
section_2_2.intro: We may collect the following personal data:
items: TAX ID or tax identification number
Browsing data through cookies (see our Cookie Policy)

section_2_3.title: 2.3 Purpose of Processing
items: Manage the purchase and sale of vehicles

section_2_4.title: 2.4 User Rights
section_2_4.content: You have the right to access, rectify, delete or limit the processing of your data by sending an email to:

section_4_2.title: 4.2 Terms of Use
items: The user agrees to use the site legally and responsibly.
We reserve the right to modify content and conditions without prior notice.
We do not guarantee the accuracy or permanent updating of information.

section_4_3.title: 4.3 Registration and User Data
section_4_3.content: To access certain services, the user may need to register and provide personal data. This data will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

section_4_4.title: 4.4 Prices and Payments
section_4_4.content: The prices of vehicles and services shown on the website may be subject to change and do not constitute a binding offer.

section_4_5.title: 4.5 Right of Withdrawal
section_4_5.content: The user may exercise their right of withdrawal within 14 days after the purchase, in accordance with current regulations.

section_4_6.title: 4.6 Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
section_4_6.content_prefix: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute will be resolved in the courts of

section_3_1.title: 3.1 Do we use cookies?
section_3_1.content: No. This website does not use cookies or similar technologies (such as pixels, local storage, or tracking identifiers).

section_3_2.title: 3.2 What this means
section_3_2.content: Your browsing on this site does not generate any tracking, and no personal or behavioural information is collected through cookies.

section_3_3.title: 3.3 Transparency and privacy
section_3_3.content: We are committed to providing you with a fully transparent and privacy-respectful experience. If, in the future, we implement strictly necessary or other types of cookies, we will update this policy and request your consent in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
